entry.title: New: Bill 102 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, APPENDIX A, PART II, OPEN SPACE, NATURAL RESOURCES, CULTURAL RESOURCES, AND SCENIC VIEWS PRESERVATION FUND, NEW APPROPRIATION FOR $500,000 FOR ACQUISITION OF 104A LOWER WAIEHU BEACH ROAD AND DELETION OF APPROPRIATION FOR THE ACQUISITION OF 131 SHAW STREET"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
